docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIN-ORTEGA, MIGUEL-ROBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT LEIBOWITZ, ALTAGRACIA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA THE NETWORK STORE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIN-ORTEGA, MIGUEL-ROBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEIBOWITZ, ALTAGRACIA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA THE NETWORK STORE $14,116.73 PRINCIPAL, $148.22 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,634.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
